entries.story: As a registered user, I want to subscribe to Cinema premium, so that I can access premium features.
As a registered user, I want to enter my payment details, so that I can subscribe to Cinema premium.
As an administrator, I want an overview of historic user payments, so that I can identify customer payment-related issues.
As a premium user, I want to change my automated renew subscription status, so that it aligns with my needs.

As a premium user, I want my location to be gathered, so that I can get accurate movie showing information nearby.
As a premium user, I want nearby movie showings to be sorted by distance to me, so that I can view relevant showings first.
As a premium user, I want to view only the top 5 nearby movie showings, so that I can view relevant showings first.

As a premium user, I want to share a specific movie showing on Instagram, so that I can let my friends know.

As a registered user, I want to set my lists to private, so that I can ensure my privacy when I want.

As a registered user, I want to organize my lists into self-defined categories, so that I can manage them effectively.
